contracts.agentMessage:
SNAPLINE FOUND UI DRIFT

src/app/page.tsx

2 violations:
- [error] arbitrary value: min-w-[760px] (line 135)
- [error] raw <button> used while <Button> exists (line 153)

Repair:
- Replace min-w-[760px] with min-w-96 (384px) if the value is still needed — arbitrary values bypass the design scale.
- Import Button from "@/components/ui/button" and replace the raw <button> with <Button>. Use variant props (variant="default" | "outline" | "ghost" | "destructive") instead of color classes.
